title: Materializing properties (triples) accross all graphs causes error on restart
poc:
Prefix ogc: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
Prefix geom: <http://geovocab.org/geometry#>

Select * {
  ?s geom:geometry [ ogc:asWKT ?g ] .
  Filter(bif:st_intersects (?g, bif:st_point (0, 0), 1000)) .
}
Limit 10
key_bug_features: Materializing properties across all graphs on server restart
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://g1> { ex:s1 ex:p1 ex:o1 . ex:s2 ex:p2 ex:o2 . } GRAPH <http://g2> { ex:s3 ex:p3 ex:o3 . } };
SPARQL INSERT { GRAPH ?g { ?p a rdf:Property } } WHERE { { SELECT DISTINCT ?g ?p WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } } };
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?p a rdf:Property } };

SPARQL PREFIX geom: <http://geovocab.org/geometry#> PREFIX ogc: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://geo> { <http://example.org/s> geom:geometry [ ogc:asWKT "POINT(0 0)" ] . } };

SPARQL PREFIX geom: <http://geovocab.org/geometry#> PREFIX ogc: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s geom:geometry [ ogc:asWKT ?g ] FILTER(bif:st_intersects(?g, bif:st_point(0,0), 1000)) } LIMIT 10;
SPARQL PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT ?p WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?p a rdf:Property } };
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?p a rdf:Property } };
bug_features_seed: INSERT { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s a <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#Property> } } { SELECT DISTINCT ?s WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s ?p ?o } } };
